basic_details.short_information: Acharyashree Bhikshu Govt. Hospital Delhi (ABGH Delhi) Recruitment 2026 for 5 posts of Junior Resident. Candidates with MBBS Can attend walkin. The Walk-in on 02-06-2026. For detailed information please visit ABGH Delhi official website.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 30 years for General, 35 years for SC/ST, 33 years for OBC

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree from a recognized university and must have completed internship on or before 02.06.2026.

seo_tags: ABGH Delhi Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
